title: iris tenax var. gormanii
intro: Iris tenax var. gormanii, also known as Gorman's iris, is a variant of the Iris tenax species, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Iris tenax var. gormanii include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
